meta.title: ON-GI
meta.description: You are the light of the world. Let's brighten the darkness with the warmth of prayer.
meta.inviteDescription: You are the light of the world. Join us in prayer through this invite link.

easter.verse1:
You are the light of the world.
A city set on a hill cannot be hidden.
easter.title: The Story of Those Who Made This
easter.story1:
One of us was a marketer.
After six years of work, the question of what work means had stayed with him for a long time.
easter.story2:
After prayer, one question remained.
"Could technology like AI serve the church and the faith of Christians?"
easter.story3: Carrying that question, he looked for a fellow worker.
easter.story4:
The other was a developer.
He admired the way startups solve the world's problems,
yet had not first sought what the Lord desired on that path.
He spent three years waiting for the Lord's timing.
easter.story5:
One winter, on a day of futsal outreach,
a small idea shared by a brother became a spark.
From that spark, 'ONGI' was first sketched.
easter.story6:
And so it began.
Asking for nothing in return —
simply to discern what is pleasing to the Lord.
easter.story7:
We hope this app becomes the light of prayers
rising from every corner of the world.
easter.verse2:
So that you may approve what is excellent,
filled with the fruit of righteousness that comes through Jesus Christ,
to the glory and praise of God.
